title: Founding Growth Lead
key_evidence: Requires 4+ yrs growth/commercial at seed-Series A startups; Ryan has ~4.4 yrs at Minima (seed->Series A) as first employee — direct match on stage/tenure.

Must be 'genuinely fluent in AI' with daily hands-on use and workflow building; Ryan builds Claude Code agents (competitor-intel + growth) — strong direct match, and the apply form explicitly requires an example AI workflow.
Must 'build sales pipeline from scratch' via cold calls/email/LinkedIn + B2B events; Ryan's growth is community-led/PR/content, NOT B2B outbound sales pipeline — this is the primary requirements gap.

Funding: $1M seed (Steven Bartlett, Balderton, Dawn, Microsoft AI partners); named 'hottest startup in London' by Sifted; UK Gov AI-upskilling events partner; trained 1,000+ teams. High media visibility => elevated applicant volume.
2-person founder team (Amelia & Lydia Miller, both Forbes 30u30); apply via short typeform direct to founders — founder-read screening, no recruiter/ATS keyword filter.
Salary £50-80k + equity, in-office Shoreditch — clears £50k floor; clear founder-led process.
biggest_lever: Lead with the $4.5m community-led presale (15x ROI on $300k) reframed as zero-to-one pipeline building + the Claude Code AI workflow example the form demands — both map directly to 'build growth from scratch' and 'fluent in AI'.
biggest_risk: Role is explicitly B2B outbound sales-pipeline ownership (cold outreach, deal closure for clients like Red Bull); Ryan has no enterprise B2B sales/closing track record — community-led growth may read as adjacent not core. High media hype also raises applicant volume.
estimation_method: Soft signals only, no hard date. (1) Lovable one-pager (growth-lead-ivee.lovable.app) confirmed LIVE — 'Now hiring · Founding team', Apply button active, GBP50-80k+equity, GBP1,000 referral bonus, ALSO hiring a Technical Project Manager => active multi-role founding drive. (2) JD says 'we recently closed a $1M seed round' (present-recent framing). (3) generalist.world tags it '✨ New'. (4) Wayback: Lovable custom subpath not archived (only lovable.app root captured); LinkedIn ivee jobs undated/different brand (iveejobs/return-to-work). High media velocity (Sifted 'hottest startup', Forbes 30u30, UK Gov AI partner) supports an active fresh campaign. No single signal gives a date -> estimated 1-4wk window, midpoint ~2-3wk bucket.
recency_note: Live (verified on Lovable page + corroborated active multi-role hiring drive: also recruiting Technical PM). No hard posting date — Lovable subpath unarchivable, no dated aggregator. Soft signals (live page, 'recently closed seed', generalist.world 'New', heavy media velocity) -> estimated 1-4wk, midpoint 2-3wk bucket -> G_recency=52, low-med confidence. NOTE one stale WebSearch snippet showed GBP40-50k but the LIVE Lovable page confirms GBP50-80k (original file value retained). Callback_v2 62 -> 64.
momentum_signals: HIGH MEDIA VELOCITY: Sifted 'hottest startup in London'; both founders (Amelia + Lydia Miller) named Forbes 30u30; UK Gov primary AI-upskilling events partner (secured in <1 week); 1,000+ teams trained; clients Red Bull/Virgin Media/Lucky Saint (Sifted, UK News Group, 2026).

POSSIBLE FRESH RAISE: search snippet indicates ivee 'announced a $12.5M Series A' on top of the prior $1M seed (Steven Bartlett, Balderton, Dawn, Microsoft AI partners). Series A not independently date-confirmed here -> treat as probable strong upward signal, hence med confidence.

EXPLICIT HIRING DRIVE: actively building founding team — Founding Growth Lead JD ('build B2B engine from zero alongside cofounders') + concurrently hiring a Technical PM; live Lovable one-pager with active Apply + £1,000 referral bonus = energetic, ongoing campaign.
FOUNDER-READ SCREENING: 2-person founder team, apply via short typeform direct to founders — responsive/no-ATS-gatekeeping likely; no negative candidate-treatment signal found.
COUNTER-SIGNAL: high media hype raises applicant volume (competition), and undatable posting tempers freshness — momentum is strong but not a clean fresh-funding+role-named hiring post.
